summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Flowtym Configuration Module. Backend: 23/23 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 7 sections verified - Hotel Profile, Room Types, Rooms, Rate Plans, Policies, Users, Settings. All CRUD operations working correctly. Excel template download functional.

integration_issues.issue: Transient 'Erreur lors du chargement' toast appears briefly when navigating to /config before auth token is fully loaded

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/config/hotels/{hotel_id}/room-types/{type_id} - Gets single room type
Backend: POST /api/config/hotels/{hotel_id}/rate-plans - Creates base rate plan
Backend: POST /api/config/hotels/{hotel_id}/rate-plans - Creates derived rate plan with derivation rules
Backend: GET /api/config/roles - Returns available roles with permissions
Backend: GET /api/config/hotels/{hotel_id}/summary - Returns configuration summary with completion percentage
Frontend: Configuration page loads at /config with sidebar navigation
Frontend: All 7 navigation sections present (Profil Hôtel, Typologies, Chambres, Plans Tarifaires, Conditions, Utilisateurs, Paramètres)
Frontend: Hotel Profile section - form fields and save button working
Frontend: Room Types section - Add button, empty state display
Frontend: Rooms section - Import Excel and Add buttons, filters
Frontend: Rate Plans section - Base rates and derived rates sections
Frontend: Policies section - Cancellation and Payment tabs with add buttons
Frontend: Users section - User table, roles reference, add user button
Frontend: Settings section - Taxes, booking rules, notifications sections
critical_code_review_comments: ConfigurationPage.jsx: Consider adding auth check before loading summary to prevent transient error toast
All APIs properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
Soft delete pattern used consistently across all entities
Derived rate plans correctly validate parent rate existence
seed_data_creation: Test data created via backend tests with TEST_ prefix, cleaned up after tests. Existing data: 4 room types, 1 room, 2 rate plans, 1 cancellation policy, 1 payment policy, 1 user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Configuration module fully tested. All 7 sections working: Hotel Profile (GET/PUT), Room Types (CRUD), Rooms (CRUD + Excel import), Rate Plans (CRUD + derivation), Cancellation Policies (CRUD), Payment Policies (CRUD), Users (CRUD), Settings (GET/PUT + taxes). APIs at /api/config/*. Frontend uses data-testid='nav-{section}' for navigation. Summary endpoint returns completion_percentage and checklist.

hotel_profile.get_profile: GET /api/config/hotels/{id}/profile - Returns profile with address, contact, regional settings
hotel_profile.update_profile: PUT /api/config/hotels/{id}/profile - Updates name, stars, currency, timezone, check-in/out times

room_types.list: GET /api/config/hotels/{id}/room-types - Returns list with room_count per type
room_types.create: POST - Creates with code, name, category, occupancy, base_price, equipment
room_types.update: PUT - Updates any field, validates code uniqueness
room_types.delete: DELETE - Soft delete, prevents if rooms using type

rooms.list: GET /api/config/hotels/{id}/rooms - Supports filters: room_type_id, floor, status
rooms.create: POST - Creates with room_number, room_type_id, floor, view, bathroom
rooms.excel_import: POST preview + POST confirm - Validates and imports rooms from Excel

rate_plans.list: GET /api/config/hotels/{id}/rate-plans - Returns base and derived rates
rate_plans.create_derived: POST - Creates with parent_rate_id and derivation_rule (percentage/fixed_amount)

users.list: GET /api/config/hotels/{id}/users - Returns users with role, department
users.create: POST - Creates with email, name, role, department, phone
users.roles: GET /api/config/roles - Returns admin, reception, revenue_manager, housekeeping, accounting, readonly

settings.get: GET /api/config/hotels/{id}/settings - Returns taxes, booking rules, notifications
settings.update: PUT - Updates min/max booking advance, arrival/departure times, overbooking
